prompt: Implement Phase 1 — Foundation & Project Setup for the trackgentic library. Read ALL spec files in .agentic/specs/ (01 through 05) first. Then implement: (1) All types in src/types/ matching 02-data-model.md and 03-api-specification.md, (2) Core modules: errors.ts (TrackgenticError class with all error codes from spec), id.ts (generateId/generateCommentId using Date.now().toString(36).slice(0,6)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(-4)), resolution.ts (walk up from cwd looking for .trackgentic/ dir, return abs path or null), tracker.ts (Tracker class with constructor(cwd?) and init() method that creates .trackgentic/ with config.json, index.json, dependencies.json, users.json, issues/ dir — idempotent, returns ALREADY_INITIALIZED if exists), (3) CLI: runner.ts (Commander program with init subcommand), output.ts (JSON formatting to stdout/stderr), commands/init.ts, (4) Entry points: src/index.ts (barrel exports matching spec section 9) and src/bin.ts (shebang + run CLI). Also create empty stubs for events.ts, index-manager.ts, dependency-manager.ts, auth.ts. Tests in tests/core/ for id, resolution, tracker init, and tests/cli/commands.test.ts for init CLI. All tests must pass with bun test. Typescript strict mode, ESM imports, Bun runtime.

response_preview:
